title: 【長康七號】康美樓社署服務中心 傳至少5社工入院有人發燒

replies.msg:
青衣長康邨康美樓出現集體感染武漢肺炎，至今4名住客確診，其中一名女住客曾返田灣拜年，其父亦證實確診，事件令人聯想到2003年沙士疫潮中淘大花園E座的「疫廈」重演。而位於康美樓地下的社會福利署南青衣綜合家庭服務中心，昨日突然貼出通告暫停開放，網上隨即流傳服務中心有一半社工感到不適需要送院，不少人出現武漢肺炎病徵，華員會則指有5人出現感冒症狀，武漢肺炎測試仍未有結果。《蘋果》正向社會福利署查詢。


https://s.nextmedia.com/realtime/a.php?i=20200212&s=10829391&a=60588736

抵啦 鬼叫公務員唔罷工
慢慢返工啦

replies.msg: 屋宇署表示，周日（9日）晚上接獲一名職員通知，其家人確診新型冠狀病毒肺炎，正在醫院接受治療，該員工亦已按衞生署指示接受隔離，目前並沒有任何感染徵狀。據該員工表示，上月29日曾返回屋宇署位於西九龍政府合署北座的辦公室工作，逗留約半小時，當時他有戴上囗罩，辦公室亦沒有其他職員。

呢種不畏懼攬炒政策，諗起都

*Message to BD Colleagues*

We have been informed that a family member of one of our colleagues of EBDs has been confirmed to have contracted Novel Coronavirus today. The colleague has no symptom up till now. However, the colleague concerned will be quarantined for 14 days until 22 February 2020.

The colleague went back to WKGO on 29 January 2020 (*12 days ago*) at about 2:00 pm for about half an hour, wearing mask all the time and only stayed on 8/F without any contact with other colleague during that period.

Please note that while we have only been informed of the case today, we have been keeping on our enhanced cleansing measures using 1:99 bleach everyday from Monday to Friday, particularly as a precautionary measure, a full scale cleansing of WKGO office and communal areas by 1:99 bleach was completed on 2 February 2020. We have also consulted Centre of Health Protection immediately and were advised that no specific urgent follow up action was required. As a general advice, cleansing with 1:99 bleach on a daily basis is necessary as one of the precautionary measures to fight against the epidemic. This has already been in line with our current practices.

Nevertheless, we will further enhance the cleansing arrangement in view of the latest situation. We have arranged another full scale cleansing for WKGO office areas on Monday 10 February 2020. Arrangement for NBDs offices will also be made.

We will continue to closely monitor the hygiene conditions of our office accommodation. We will also inform you of the situation of our colleague as appropriate.

The working schedule for the coming week will be similar to the last week while the manpower requirements will be reduced after we have critically reviewed the workload and output last week.

Thank you for all your continued support and vigilancy to fight the epidemic together.
一定要留命見證時代巨輪發生
